title: [FIRRTL] Incorrect directory behavior when testbench involved

features.name: module instantiation in layerblock and at top level with testbench directory
features.description: Code should include a module that is instantiated both inside a layerblock and at a higher hierarchy level, where the module is also marked with a testbench directory annotation
features.snippet:
layer A, bind, "internal":
module Baz:
  wire a: UInt<1>
  invalidate a
module Bar:
  layerblock A:
    inst baz of Baz
public module Foo:
  inst bar of Bar
  inst baz of Baz

features.name: module with invalidated wire in testbench and layerblock contexts
features.description: Code should include a module containing an invalidated wire that is instantiated across different directory contexts (testbench and internal layer)
features.snippet:
module Baz:
  wire a: UInt<1>
  invalidate a

features.name: bind statement with layer and testbench module interactions
features.description: Code should include bind statements that reference modules instantiated across both layerblock and testbench directories, where directory LCA computation fails
